title: Economics — Supply & Demand
description: Equilibrium, surplus, and shift analysis flowchart.

blocks.title: Shifts vs movements
blocks.markdown:
| Change | Curve | Result |
|--------|-------|--------|
| Price only | Move along | ΔQ on same curve |
| Income / prefs | Demand shifts | New P*, Q* |
| Cost / tech | Supply shifts | New P*, Q* |

blocks.title: Shock analysis
blocks.mermaid:
flowchart TD
  A[Identify shock] --> B{Demand or supply?}
  B -->|Demand| C[Shift D left/right]
  B -->|Supply| D[Shift S left/right]
  C --> E[New intersection]
  D --> E
  E --> F[Compare P* Q*]
